case_title: LOUIS A. GAGE VS. WARREL COORE et al

docket_entries.description: DECLARATION LOUIS A. GAGE FILED RE: IN SUPPORT OF ORIGINAL WRITTEN LEASE'S UNAVAILBILITY (CCR 3.1806) FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A.
EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY AS TO DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL

MASTER CALENDAR MOTION ON SEP-14-2011 IN DEPT. 206, HEARING ON APPLICANT/DEFENDANT WARREL COORE'S WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS. NO APPEARANCE BY APPLICANT. THE COURT DENIED THE APPLICATION IN WHOLE. ORDER SIGNED, AND ENDORSED-FILED COPY MAILED TO APPLICANT. JUDGE: MARLA MILLER; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
REFUND/REIMBURSEMENT OF $16.33 RE 28974 FOR TRANSACTION W3611809R009 (RENT DEPOSIT), PAYABLE TO LOUIS A GAGE, DOC #1904021576, WARRANT #38201103, DATED OCT-06-2011
UNLAWFUL DETAINER - RESIDENTIAL, COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A. AS TO DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED
REQUEST FOR ENTRY OF DEFAULT/DEFAULT ENTERED, CLERK'S JUDGMENT REQUESTED, DECLARATION OF NON-MILITARY STATUS AS TO DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL
DECLARATION OF DAILY RENTAL VALUE $1.96 FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A.
DEFAULT JUDGMENT REJECTED, PLACED IN PICKUP BOX, SUBMITTED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A. AS TO DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL

UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 1169 C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL THE RESTITUTION AND POSSESSION OF THE PREMISES: 368 BAKER STREET, #B, SAN FRANCISCO, CA 94117, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT
EX PARTE APPLICATION FOR ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION FILED BY DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL
ORDER DENYING WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68634 (E), CRC 3.52 AS TO DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT ALSO SERVED PREJUDGMENT CLAIM OF RIGHT TO POSSESSION, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF GAGE, LOUIS A. SERVED JUL-07-2011, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL

APPLICATION PENDING FOR WAIVER OF COURT FEES AND COSTS PURSUANT TO G.C. 68633, CRC 3.51, 8.26, AND 8.818 (CONFIDENTIAL) FILED BY DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL HEARING SET FOR SEP-14-2011 AT 09:00 AM IN DEPT 206
ORDER FOR STAY OF EXECUTION STAYED UNTIL AUG-16-2011
RENT DEPOSIT DEPOSITED BY DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL
RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, FULLY SATISFIED AS TO DEFENDANT COORE, WARREL
